creator: lightside@gmx.com
text:
Created attachment 213048
Proposed patch (since 530516 revision)

Patch to update x11-fonts/fontconfig port, based on attachment #212645 and bug 239167 comment #35:

- Add upstream patch to files/patch-2.13.92.diff file:
https://cgit.freedesktop.org/fontconfig/commit/?id=6f6b39780215714386606ca1c5457a7106639ff4
- Rename pkg-messsage file to pkg-message
% make -C /usr/ports/x11-fonts/fontconfig -V PKGMESSAGE
/usr/ports/x11-fonts/fontconfig/pkg-message
